About Us

ZEGORA — Your Trusted Ethiopian Employment Agency

ZEGORA Foreign Employment Agency is dedicated to connecting skilled Ethiopian professionals with rewarding career opportunities around the world.

20+ Years

About Us

A Pioneer in Foreign Employment Services

Zegora Foreign Private Employment Agent is a pioneering recruitment company with more than two decades of experience in overseas employment services. Since its establishment, we have connected qualified job seekers with reputable international employers through professional, ethical and reliable recruitment solutions.

With 20+ years of industry experience, Zegora has built a strong reputation for excellence, integrity and customer satisfaction — specializing in international workforce placement for employers and candidates alike.

Mission

Provide trusted and efficient overseas employment opportunities while delivering exceptional service to employers and job seekers.

Vision

Be a leading and respected foreign employment agency recognized for excellence, integrity and successful international placements.

Learn More About Us
